events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** — riser-rated (CMR) cable installed in a plenum air-handling space instead of plenum-rated (CMP) cable, a fire/smoke-toxicity code violation under NEC 800.154. Since it's still rough-complete (pre-closeout), the fix (swap to CMP-listed cable in plenum runs) is straightforward now but must happen before any cover-up — flagged as high risk given the life-safety fire-spread implications.
